import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  id: string;
  "name": string;
  "email": string;
  "role": string;
  "status": string;
  "progress": number;
  "rating": number;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Team — per-column renderers",
  "description": "Each column ships its own typed CellRenderer.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 6,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": false,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": false,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Member",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "role",
      "label": "Role",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "progress",
      "label": "Progress",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "rating",
      "label": "Rating",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
